description: DAIMON V1 alpha NPC tier roster. 25 named opponents across 5 tiers (Rookie -> Champion). Each NPC has a fixed loadout drawn from the v1_alpha catalog. Difficulty climbs by trigger-density and synergy, not by stat inflation. Used by dm_match_npc + `daimon match-npc`.

tiers.label: Rookie
tiers.rule: All-commons or 5 commons + 1 uncommon. No deep synergy. Beginner-safe.

tiers.label: Novice
tiers.rule: Commons + 2 uncommons, occasional rare. Light single-trigger setups.

tiers.label: Veteran
tiers.rule: Rares anchor; 2-3 trigger cards in concert.

tiers.label: Elite
tiers.rule: Epic anchor + rares; 3-4 triggers fire per round.

tiers.label: Champion
tiers.rule: Legendary anchor + epics + tight synergy. Endgame fight.
